testcase.name: test_subprocess_audit_guards_all_pass

failure.message: AssertionError: audit guards exited non-zero. stdout: {"ok": false, "command": "audit.guards", "data": {"checks": [{"name": "validate_workflows", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_no_pyc", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_source_keys", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_statuses", "ok": false}, {"name": "compileall", "ok": true}, {"name": "cli_availability", "ok": true}], "all_passed": false, "errors": ["ERROR: hardcoded ingestion status strings detected:\n backend/app/core/task_status.py:24: hardcoded status literal 'completed' (import from app.ingestion.status stderr: assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['/Users/dawsonblock/JUDGE_ATLASX-main/backend/.venv/bin/judgectl', '--json', 'audit', 'guards']...oded status literal \'completed\' (import from app.ingestion.statuses)"]}, "warnings": [], "errors": []}\n', stderr='').returncode

testcase.failure: backend/app/tests/test_cli_subprocess.py:201: in test_subprocess_audit_guards_all_pass assert proc.returncode == 0, ( E AssertionError: audit guards exited non-zero. E stdout: {"ok": false, "command": "audit.guards", "data": {"checks": [{"name": "validate_workflows", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_no_pyc", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_source_keys", "ok": true}, {"name": "check_statuses", "ok": false}, {"name": "compileall", "ok": true}, {"name": "cli_availability", "ok": true}], "all_passed": false, "errors": ["ERROR: hardcoded ingestion status strings detected:\n backend/app/core/task_status.py:24: hardcoded status literal 'completed' (import from app.ingestion.status E stderr: E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['/Users/dawsonblock/JUDGE_ATLASX-main/backend/.venv/bin/judgectl', '--json', 'audit', 'guards']...oded status literal \'completed\' (import from app.ingestion.statuses)"]}, "warnings": [], "errors": []}\n', stderr='').returncode
